sn12.3:1.2: This discourse, located so prominently in the Saṁyutta, heads off the misconception that dependent origination is purely a theoretical or philosophical doctrine. Obviously it has a philosophical dimension, but it is aligned with the path of practice which also proceeds via cessation. The next Sutta shows how the sequence unfolded as a contemplative reflection. See too SN 45.1, where ignorance lies at the head of the noble eightfold path.
